output.answer: Dakar is located at approximately 14.67°N, 17.43°W (coordinates: POINT(-17.432000 14.672556))
output.formatted:
Dakar is located at approximately 14.67°N, 17.43°W (coordinates: POINT(-17.432000 14.672556))

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?coordinate WHERE {
  wd:Q3718 wdt:P625 ?coordinate
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| coordinate                                   |
| -------------------------------------------- |
| POINT(-17.432000 14.672556) (geo:wktLiteral) |
